_metadata.description: Central field mapping registry for Nirvaah AI Form Agent (Stage 6). Maps ASHA worker voice-extracted fields to HMIS indicator codes, MCTS beneficiary record fields, and Kerala e-Health HIMS fields. Built from: RCH Register Section II (PW-1 to PW-4A), RCH Register Section III (CH-1 to CH-3), HMIS Monthly/Annual Consolidated forms, NHM ANM Instruction Manual, and Nirvaah AI Technical Build Reference.

_extraction_output_schema._description: Defines the exact JSON shape the Claude Intent Agent (Stage 4) must return. The Validation Agent (Stage 5) depends on this contract.
_extraction_output_schema._source: Build ref Stage 4: 'instruct Claude to assign a 0-1 confidence score to each extracted field and to the overall extraction'

extracted_fields.description: Keys are field_names from schema_registry. Each value is an object with 'value' and 'confidence'.

value_structure.value: The extracted value, typed correctly (int/float/string/boolean/date as per schema data_type)
value_structure.confidence: float 0.0-1.0. 1.0=explicitly stated. 0.7-0.99=inferred with context. <0.7=unclear, triggers clarification loop.

overall_confidence.description: Mean confidence across all required fields for this visit_type. Below 0.70 triggers full clarification.

extraction_notes.description: Free-text notes on ambiguities, code-switching issues, or missing context. Used for audit trail.

missing_required_fields.description: List of field_names that are required for this visit_type but not found in the transcript.

validation_agent_rules.clarification_condition: IF overall_confidence < 0.70 OR any required field confidence < 0.70 OR missing_required_fields is not empty
validation_agent_rules.clarification_message_format: Short, specific WhatsApp message. Example: 'BP reading unclear — please reply with systolic/diastolic (e.g. 110/70)'

claude_api_instructions.response_format: Respond ONLY with valid JSON matching this schema. No markdown fences. No explanation outside JSON.

whatsapp_templates._description: Pre-written WhatsApp message templates for all notification types. Used by notifications.py (Stage 11). Templates are bilingual: English first, then Malayalam key facts.
whatsapp_templates._source: Build ref Stage 11 and Section 8.1 pre-hackathon tasks. Build ref Section 2.4 provides the build_confirmation() function pattern.

worker_confirmation.template:
*Visit Logged — {beneficiary_name}*
BP: {bp_systolic}/{bp_diastolic} ({bp_status})
Hb: {hemoglobin} ({hb_status})
IFA tabs given: {iron_tablets_given}
Next visit: {next_visit_date} at {next_visit_location}
Record #{record_id} synced.
---
*{beneficiary_name}-nte visit record #{record_id} save cheythu.*
worker_confirmation.bp_status_logic: if bp_systolic < 140 and bp_diastolic < 90: 'Normal' else: '⚠ HIGH — Alert'
worker_confirmation.hb_status_logic: if hemoglobin >= 11: 'Normal' elif hemoglobin >= 7: 'Low — Anemia protocol' else: '🔴 Severe Anemia — REFER'

clarification_request.trigger: When overall_confidence < 0.70 or a required field is missing

example_questions.bp_unclear: BP reading unclear — please reply with systolic/diastolic (e.g. 110/70)
example_questions.hb_unclear: Haemoglobin value not clear — please reply with Hb in g/dL (e.g. 10.2)
example_questions.date_unclear: Next visit date not clear — please reply with date (e.g. 14/03/2024)

high_risk_alert_supervisor.trigger: When dropout_risk_score > 0.70 — sent to supervisor's WhatsApp

anomaly_types.gps_impossibility: Same worker, 2 submissions >30km apart within 15 minutes
anomaly_types.field_duplication: Identical BP values across different beneficiaries same day

scheme_enrollment_prompt.trigger: When beneficiary is eligible for a scheme but not enrolled — sent to worker

whatsapp_templates.sandbox_limitation_note: Templates use Twilio WhatsApp Sandbox in hackathon. In production, use WhatsApp Business API with pre-approved template messages. Sandbox allows free-form messaging to opted-in numbers only.

google_sheets_mapping._description: Column headers and field mappings for the Google Sheets mock HMIS portal. Used by sync_agent.py (Stage 7) via gspread. Each sheet tab maps to a reporting section. All HMIS column headers are verified against HMIS Monthly Consolidated XLS.
google_sheets_mapping._source: Build ref Stage 7: 'Create a Google Sheet with column headers matching HMIS field names.' HMIS Monthly Consolidated XLS verified.
google_sheets_mapping._gspread_usage: import gspread; gc = gspread.service_account(filename=GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS); sh = gc.open('Nirvaah_HMIS_Mock'); ws = sh.worksheet('ANC'); ws.append_row(row_values)

columns.hmis_indicator: Total number of pregnant women Registered for ANC
Total number of pregnant women given 100 IFA tablets
Number of Caesarean (C-Section) deliveries performed at
Number of Newborns having weight less than 2.5 kg
Number of Newborns breast fed within 1 hour
Total number of children aged between 9 and 11 months who have been fully immunised (BCG+DPT123+OPV123+Measles)
Number of Oral Pills cycles distributed
Number of Emergency Contraceptive Pills distributed
Number of new RTI/STI for which treatment initiated
Number of MTPs conducted at Public Institutions

These codes follow MCTS field naming conventions from the MCTS Field Specification document (Build ref Section 1.2) and are used by form_agent.py to route fields to the MCTS-mirrored Supabase table. They do NOT represent official MCTS portal field IDs.

fields.description: Bank account number and branch for DBT scheme payments (JSY, PMMVY)

fields.hmis_code_note: No HMIS aggregate indicator. Supabase + MCTS individual record only.
fields.rch_column_note: Not a printed RCH register column. Collected verbally during registration. ASHA handbook Format 7 (worker database) confirms education is recorded.
fields.description: Highest education level of the pregnant woman. 4-level encoding from NFHS-5/DHS standard (variable HV106). Used as XGBoost dropout model feature.
fields.source_evidence: CNNS 2019 report confirms 4-level education classification: No schooling / <5yr / 7-11yr / higher. NFHS-5 DHS variable HV106 uses 0-3 encoding. ASHA Handbook confirmed education field in ASHA worker database Format 7.
fields.extraction_note: ASHA worker states education level during beneficiary registration. If not stated, leave null — model uses mean imputation. Do not guess.

fields.hmis_code_note: No HMIS aggregate indicator. Supabase operational field only.
fields.rch_column_note: Not a printed RCH column but documented in birth preparedness planning forms in ASHA training modules T5/T6.
fields.description: Road distance from beneficiary's home to the nearest PHC. Used in XGBoost dropout model (distance increases missed-visit probability) and to trigger Sneha Sparsham/JSSK transport support alerts.
fields.source_evidence: ASHA training modules T5/T6 include 'Distance from PHC' in birth preparedness planning. Concept validated in ASHA Handbook infant-death annexure. Kerala PHC location data available from data.gov.in for distance calculations.
fields.extraction_note: Extract if ASHA worker mentions distance. Do NOT hallucinate — leave null if not stated. Model uses mean imputation for missing values. Can be computed offline from Kerala PHC GIS data if beneficiary address is known.

fields.hmis_code_note: No HMIS code. Supabase operational field for scheme eligibility engine.
fields.description: Whether the beneficiary is enrolled in Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana. Boolean: true=enrolled, false=not enrolled, null=not assessed.
fields.source_evidence: PMMVY scheme details from Build Reference Section 10 scheme eligibility table. First live birth + Aadhaar linked + registered before 19 weeks = eligible.

derived_eligibility_check.condition: total_pregnancies == 1 AND aadhaar_number IS NOT NULL AND gestational_age_at_registration_weeks <= 19

fields.extraction_note: Ask ASHA worker if beneficiary has PMMVY registration number. If confirmed enrolled, set true.

fields.hmis_code_note: No HMIS aggregate indicator. Derived from RCH PW-1 cols 19-20 obstetric history. Supabase + MCTS only.
fields.rch_column_note: RCH PW-1 col 19: 'Details of last two pregnancies — Outcome of Pregnancy'. Col 20: 'Expected place and name of facility for delivery'. Prior institutional delivery is inferred from col 19 outcome + col 20 facility history.
fields.description: Whether any previous pregnancy was delivered at a health institution (not home). Boolean derived from obstetric history at registration. XGBoost dropout model feature.
fields.source_evidence: Build ref Stage 10: 'Previous delivery at institution vs home'. RCH PW-1 cols 19-20 record past pregnancy outcomes and delivery facility. ANM Instruction Manual confirms ASHA workers record this during registration.
fields.derivation_note: If total_pregnancies == 1: null (first pregnancy, no prior delivery). Extract from ASHA verbal report on prior birth location.
fields.extraction_note: Ask: 'Where did you deliver your last baby — hospital or home?' If first pregnancy, leave null.

fields.hmis_code_note: No HMIS aggregate indicator. Operational ML field. Supabase + MCTS only.
fields.rch_column_note: RCH PW-4 cols 65-72 record PNC visits for the current pregnancy. Prior PNC history is self-reported by beneficiary during current registration.
fields.description: Whether the beneficiary received any postnatal care after a previous delivery. XGBoost dropout model feature — prior PNC strongly predicts current-pregnancy PNC completion.
fields.source_evidence: Build ref Stage 10: 'Previous postnatal care received'. PNC compliance history is a validated dropout predictor in NFHS-5 Kerala data.
fields.derivation_note: If total_pregnancies == 1: set false (no prior delivery, hence no prior PNC). If parity > 1: extract from ASHA's knowledge of beneficiary history.
fields.extraction_note: Relevant only if total_pregnancies > 1. Ask: 'Did you get check-ups after your last delivery?' If first pregnancy, default false.

anc_visit._description: PW-2 form fields for Ante Natal Care visits. Columns 23-42 of RCH Register Section II. ASHA worker records 1 to 4 ANC visits. Most common voice note type in Nirvaah AI.
anc_visit._hmis_section: Ante Natal Care Services (ANC) - Monthly Consolidated Form Section 1
anc_visit._note: If mother comes first time at any point during pregnancy, record in first visit column and give all services due for her gestational age.

kerala_hims_derived_fields._description: Fields required by Kerala e-Health HIMS that are derived from raw extracted values. Computed by Form Agent (Stage 6) before Kerala HIMS write.
kerala_hims_derived_fields._source: Build ref Stage 6 schema registry structure example: 'hb_status: derived_from:hemoglobin, anemia_grade: derived_from:hemoglobin'

hb_status.source_evidence: Kerala NHM threshold: Hb < 11 = anaemia in pregnancy. Build ref Stage 5 and Stage 6.

derivation_logic.2_Moderate: hemoglobin >= 7.0 AND < 9.0 — IFA double dose + counselling

anemia_grade.action_on_severe: Set high_risk_symptom flag. Trigger supervisor WhatsApp alert. Refer to PHC.
anemia_grade.source_evidence: ANM Instruction Manual col 38: Hb 9-11 = double dose IFA. Hb <7 = refer. Build ref Stage 5 medical range validation.

bp_category.source_evidence: HMIS Monthly Consolidated: 'Pregnant women with Hypertension (BP>140/90)'. Build ref Stage 5 pre-eclampsia protocol.

delivery_outcome._description: PW-3 form fields for delivery outcome. Columns 43-64 of RCH Register Section II. Recorded at or after delivery. Includes maternal details and infant birth details.

fields.mcts_code_note: Operational proxy MCTS code. MCTS portal is a closed government system (Build ref Section 1.1). pnc_visit._description: PW-4 form fields for Post Natal Care visits. Columns 65-81 of RCH Register Section II. 4 standard PNC visits: 1st, 3rd, 7th, and 42nd day after delivery.

fields.description: Which PNC visit. Routine 4 PNC visits on 1st, 3rd, 7th and 42nd day of delivery.

alert_rules.alert: PNC1 overdue - first day check not done within expected window

immunisation_visit._description: CH-2 and CH-3 form fields for child immunisation. Columns 13-34 of RCH Register Section III. Covers birth doses through 5 years of age. Kerala follows national EPI schedule.
immunisation_visit._kerala_schedule_note: Kerala follows national immunisation schedule. Pentavalent vaccine used in Kerala replaces DPT+HepB. Rotavirus and PCV included in Kerala universal programme.

definitions.Serious: Requires hospitalisation, clustered events, or death
definitions.Non_Serious: Mild local reaction, fever - manageable at home

alert_rules.alert: SERIOUS AEFI - immediate reporting to district immunisation officer required

vaccine_dose_fields.description: Exclusively breastfed to 6 months (no other food or liquid)

Complementary feeding not started after 7 months - counsel immediately

family_planning_visit._description: Family planning fields. Sourced from HMIS Monthly Consolidated form (Section 8) and PNC postpartum contraception field (PW-4 column 74). Recorded when ASHA facilitates family planning services.

fields.description: Name of beneficiary receiving FP service.
fields.source_evidence: Standard identifier across all visit types.

fields.description: Date of family planning visit/service.
fields.source_evidence: Standard HMIS date field for FP reporting.

fields.description: Facility where FP service was provided (PHC/CHC/DH/private).
fields.source_evidence: HMIS facility-level reporting requirement.

fields.description: Type of sterilization procedure conducted.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'NSV/Conventional Vasectomy conducted', 'Laparoscopic sterilizations conducted', 'Mini-lap sterilizations conducted', 'Post-Partum sterilizations conducted'.

fields.description: Outcome complication following sterilization, if any.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of complications following sterilization', 'Number of failures following sterilization', 'Number of deaths following sterilization'.
fields.alert_rule: If value is 'Death' or 'Complication' → immediate supervisor alert + anomaly flag.

fields.description: IUD insertion or removal service. IUD 380A is the standard copper IUD in national FP programme.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of IUD Insertions', 'Number of IUD removals', 'IUD 380 A'. PPIUCD = Post-Partum IUCD (inserted within 48 hours of delivery), per RCH Section II PW-4 col 74 footnote.

fields.description: Number of oral contraceptive pill cycles distributed to beneficiary.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of Oral Pills cycles distributed'.

fields.description: Number of Centchroman (weekly non-steroidal oral contraceptive, brand Saheli) pills given.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of Centchroman (weekly) pills given'. Saheli/Centchroman is distributed through the national FP programme.

fields.description: Number of condom pieces distributed.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of Condom pieces distributed'.

fields.description: Number of Emergency Contraceptive Pills (I-Pill/Unwanted 72) distributed.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of Emergency Contraceptive Pills distributed', 'Emergency Contraceptive Pillsx'.

fields.description: New RTI/STI case for which treatment was initiated during this visit.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of new RTI/STI for which treatment initiated', 'RTI/STI Cases'.

fields.description: Whether a wet mount test was conducted for RTI/STI diagnosis.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Number of wet mount tests conducted'.

fields.description: Whether a Medical Termination of Pregnancy was conducted.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: 'Medical Termination of Pregnancy (MTP)', 'Number of MTPs conducted at Public Institutions', 'Number of MTPs conducted at Private Facilities'.

fields.description: Whether MTP was at a public or private institution. Only populated if mtp_conducted=true.
fields.source_evidence: HMIS XLS verified: separate HMIS indicators for public vs private MTP.

fields.description: Current contraceptive method being used/adopted at this visit.
fields.source_evidence: Synthesised from HMIS FP indicators. Maps to each FP service type above.

family_planning_visit._hmis_fp_indicators_note: All 14 HMIS FP indicators above are directly verified in HMIS Monthly Consolidated XLS (MonthlyConsolidated48157805.xls strings extraction). Each field's hmis_code maps to a Form Agent write to the Google Sheets mock HMIS portal column.

validation_rules._description: Medical validation rules for the Validation Agent (Stage 5). Hard medical range rules plus Kerala protocol rules. Applied before Form Agent mapping.
validation_rules._usage: Load at startup in validation.py. Apply to extracted fields from Intent Agent output.

between_7_and_10.message: Moderate anaemia - intensive IFA and dietary advice

iron_tablets_given.note: Standard 30/month or 90-course. Double dose (60+) if Hb<11. Write NIL if none given.
iron_tablets_given._source: ANM Instruction Manual col 38 (official MoHFW): Standard=100 tablets (1/day x 100 days). Anaemia (Hb 9-11 g/dL)=200 tablets (2/day x 100 days). Build ref stated 0-100 — this is incorrect for double-dose cases. RCH Section II footnote 5 confirms: 'IF ANAEMIC, GIVE DOUBLE DOSE OF IFA'.
iron_tablets_given.alert_message: IFA > 100: verify Hb level confirms anaemia requiring double-dose (200 tablets). If Hb >= 11 and IFA > 100, flag as possible data error.

BCG.rule: BCG only at birth. REJECT if age > 1 month. Kerala protocol strict.

OPV0.rule: OPV0 birth dose within 24 hours of delivery

Measles1.error: Measles given before 9 months - dose does not count

confidence_thresholds.note: If extracted field confidence < 0.70, send WhatsApp clarification to ASHA worker before proceeding. Store pending clarification in Redis keyed by phone number.

anomaly_detection_rules.field_duplication: Identical beneficiary_name + bp_systolic + bp_diastolic across different beneficiaries same day

scheme_eligibility._description: Kerala and national scheme eligibility rules. Hard-coded in insights.py. Checked against beneficiary profile at every ANC/PNC update. Scheme alerts sent to ASHA worker via WhatsApp if eligible but not enrolled.
scheme_eligibility._source: Nirvaah AI Technical Build Reference Section 10 (Stage 10 Insights Agent)

instalment_conditions.instalment_1: Early registration of pregnancy (within 19 weeks) + 1 ANC visit
instalment_conditions.instalment_2: 6 months of pregnancy + 1 ANC visit + TT1

schemes.alert_message: PMMVY eligible - Rs 5,000 benefit available. Aadhaar must be linked. Register at PHC.

schemes.benefit: Rs 700 (rural) / Rs 600 (urban) cash transfer for institutional delivery
schemes.alert_message: JSY eligible - Rs 700 cash for institutional delivery. Ensure delivery at government facility.
Sneha Sparsham eligible - transport and nutrition support available through PHC.

schemes.benefit: Free delivery, free drugs, free diet, free referral transport, free blood
schemes.alert_message: JSSK: Free delivery entitlement at government hospital. No charges should be collected.

schemes.benefit: Free comprehensive ANC on 9th of every month at PHC/CHC
schemes.alert_message: PMSMA: Free ANC available on 9th of this month at PHC. Encourage attendance for free specialist check-up.

dropout_risk_features._description: Feature vector for XGBoost dropout risk model (Stage 10 Insights Agent). These are the exact fields extracted at each ANC visit that feed into the trained model.
dropout_risk_features._training_data: NFHS-5 Kerala dataset or synthetic equivalent. See Technical Build Reference Section 10.

features.note: PMMVY-enrolled women have lower dropout rates

medium.action: Increased monitoring, proactive WhatsApp reminder before next visit

high.action: Supervisor alert, ASHA worker follow-up required before next scheduled visit

_feature_columns_json_note._description: The models/feature_columns.json file required by the project layout. Lists XGBoost features in exact training order. Generate this file at build time.
_feature_columns_json_note._source: Build ref Section 4.1: 'models/feature_columns.json'. Must match exact column order used during model training in Colab.
_feature_columns_json_note.generate_command: python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('data/schema_registry.json')); json.dump([f['feature_name'] for f in s['dropout_risk_features']['features']], open('models/feature_columns.json','w'))"
_feature_columns_json_note.usage_in_code:
feature_columns = json.load(open('models/feature_columns.json'))
X = beneficiary_df[feature_columns]  # ensures column order matches training

supabase_table_mapping._description: How schema registry fields map to the 5 Supabase tables. Used by Sync Agent (Stage 7).

records.description: Main visit data table. One row per ASHA visit/submission.

columns.visit_type: anc_visit | pnc_visit | hbnc_visit | immunisation_visit | delivery_outcome | family_planning

beneficiaries.description: Individual beneficiary profiles. One row per beneficiary.

columns.phone: WhatsApp phone number (primary key for routing)
columns.name: worker name

audit_log.description: SHA-256 tamper-evident chain. One entry per record.

columns.record_snapshot: jsonb snapshot of record at time of audit

alerts.description: Anomaly and risk alerts for supervisor dashboard

malayalam_term_index._description: Quick-lookup dictionary of Malayalam terms and code-switched expressions used by Kerala ASHA workers. Used in Claude Intent Agent system prompt (Stage 4) for extraction.
malayalam_term_index._usage: Paste this section into the Claude system prompt as the extraction guide for Malayalam medical terms.
